title: Create & Nature 3
description: A Mod about Create and Worldgen!
body:
### This is Create & Nature 3 
For Bugs and Issues please send me a DM on Discord and give me the Version Code: MR-CN3-V.X.X.X-XXVXy for X and y give the numbers or letters and send it in this format. Then describe the issue and how to get it. 
Thanks!



Description:
```Now the focus is more around the Mod "Create" with wich you are able to build huge factories and automate things.
We also added some World-Changing Mods so that you can discover new Landscapes and animals!
With KubeJS we're currently adding new features to the game. For now we added Cicken Nuggets and a new fluid , and also some new recipes, that you can discover with the JEI/EMI Mod!
So play and have fun.

And by the way now you can play Skyblock worlds!

```
